title: NCX Tactical Additions
description: A mod for Minecraft NeoForge 1.21.1 that features everything from grenades to mines to armor to NVGs to medical items.
body:
A mod to facilitate the development of shooter-style modpacks or servers, adding various pieces of tactical equipment to allow for different plays, and also various operator utilities for the development of game modes or maps.

Current features:
- Grenades (Impact Frag, Smoke, Molotov, Expanding Foam)
- Landmines
- Redstone Receiver
- Remote Trigger
- C4 Explosive
- Night Vision Goggles
- Armor Plates
- Plate Carrier (currently not required to equip plates, will be fixed at some point!)
- Basic Guns
- Combat Knife (with an [admittedly overpowered] backstab mechanic!)
- Team Manager
- Jump Pad
- Kill Block (Invisible unbreakable passable waterloggable)
- Medical Items (Medkit, Stim)
- Bleed status effect (currently commands-only)

Planned:
- Grenades (EMP, Flashbang, Gas, Q-Field, Timed Frag)
- Low-Velocity Deflection System (basically just the Trophy System)
- Weapon Attachments
- Grenade Launchers, Construction Cannon, machine guns.
- Turrets
- Vehicles
- Satellites
- Backpacks
- Canteens (effectively just potion-on-a-keybind)
- Bandolier (for quick-swapping grenades)
- Sling (for quick-swapping guns)
- Visors (for blocking some visual effects)
- Earmuffs (for blocking some auditory effects)
- Gloves (to increase things like weapon accuracy, unarmed damage, or to allow for ledgegrabs)
- ACTUALLY REQUIRING THE PLATE CARRIER TO USE ARMOR PLATES
- 3D models for Curios items.

I WILL NOT BE ADDING A REVIVE SYSTEM. I TRIED AND IT CRASHED THE GAME.
